message:
fix(conformance): enable official manifest test with TS oracle retry (bd-150s)

- Remove #[ignore] from diff_official_manifest test - all 60 extensions pass
- Add retry logic for TS oracle timeouts (flaky under load)
- Fix clippy warning in http/client.rs (map_or_else)
- Add deterministic settings infrastructure for reproducible tests
- Add diff_community_manifest test (ignored for now)
- Add diff_deterministic_globals test

Phase 4 complete: 100% pass rate on all 60 official pi-mono extensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
